description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fedora:latest Docker image with a global DNF cache at dnf-cache/. Define a single build stage and four build jobs—build_clang, build_gcc, build_mingw32, and build_mingw64—each running on the shared tag, exporting the appropriate CC/CXX (clang or gcc) or setting PKG_CONFIG_LIBDIR and PATH for mingw, creating a build directory, running `cmake .. -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/builds/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}/<job>-build`, then `make -j4` and `make install`, and publishing the resulting <job>-build directory as an artifact that expires after 14 days. Add a build_oldgcc job that overrides the image to almalinux:8, runs the extra repository commands `$EXTRA_REPO_INST_COMMAND` and `$EXTRA_REPO_CONFIGURE_COMMAND` in the before_script, installs `$COMMON_PACKAGES` with `dnf --setopt=cachedir=`pwd`/dnf-cache -q -y install $COMMON_PACKAGES`, and performs the same cmake/make steps using gcc, also storing its artifacts in oldgcc-build for 14 days. All jobs share the global before_script that executes the extra repo commands and installs `$COMMON_PACKAGES` via DNF, and they all use the shared tag and no special rules, so they run on every commit.
